name: compozy
description: Full-lifecycle development orchestration — design, plan, implement with TDD, review, respond to feedback, and ship with engineering discipline. Jira ticket triage, Sentry error-driven workflows, and interactive QA sessions with headless Chrome reproduction. 13 commands, 17 agents, 11 skills. Flags: --auto (full autopilot), --team (collaborative agents), --worktree (parallel isolation), --repo (multi-repo support), --jira-sync (Jira progress tracking).
